[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Jhemiti''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].

In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] he served on the ''[[Corusca Rainbow]]'', an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 interdictor cruiser]] under the command of [[Uwlla Iillor]], in preparation for the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|assault on Coruscant]]. [[9 ABY/Legends|Three years later]], he was promoted to [[Captain/Legends|captain]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
